name: phishguard
description: Browser extension detecting AitM phishing attacks on Microsoft 365 / Entra ID login pages.

scripts.release: node -e "const v=process.argv[1]; if(!v||!/^v\\d/.test(v)){console.error('Usage: npm run release v1.2.3');process.exit(1);} require('child_process').execSync('git tag '+v+' && git push origin '+v,{stdio:'inherit'});" --
